# Gulf Blvd Concrete Works

## Business Information
- **Name:** Gulf Blvd Concrete Works
- **Phone:** (727) 555-0200 [PLACEHOLDER — replace before go-live]
- **Email:** info@gulfblvdconcrete.com
- **Address:** Indian Rocks Beach, FL 33785
- **Website:** https://gulfblvdconcrete.com
- **Service Area:** Gulf Boulevard corridor, Pinellas County, FL

## About
Gulf Blvd Concrete Works provides residential and commercial concrete services along the Gulf Boulevard barrier island corridor in Pinellas County, Florida. We specialize in coastal concrete applications — pool deck resurfacing, concrete driveways, patios, and foundations — using marine-grade materials rated for Florida's salt-air environment.

## Services
- Pool Deck Resurfacing — overlay systems, Kool Deck, stamped concrete for coastal Florida
- Concrete Driveways — new installation and replacement with marine-grade sealing
- Concrete Patios & Outdoor Living — stamped, brushed, and colored finishes
- Walkways & Sidewalks — pool area walkways and residential paths
- Concrete Repair & Restoration — crack repair, spalling, salt-damage restoration
- Decorative & Stamped Concrete — travertine, slate, cobblestone patterns
- Marine-Grade Concrete Sealing — silane/siloxane penetrating sealers for coastal environments
- Concrete Walls & Retaining — landscape retaining walls with proper drainage
- Hurricane-Ready Concrete Foundations — FL Building Code compliant for coastal wind zones
- Concrete Slabs — patio slabs, equipment pads, shed bases
- Slab Leveling & Lifting — mudjacking and foam lifting for settled slabs
- Concrete Overlay & Resurfacing — cost-effective surface transformation

## Service Area (Gulf Blvd Corridor)
- Indian Rocks Beach, FL 33785
- Indian Shores, FL 33785
- Redington Shores, FL 33708
- Redington Beach, FL 33708
- Madeira Beach, FL 33708
- Treasure Island, FL 33706
- St. Pete Beach, FL 33706
- Clearwater Beach, FL 33767

## Specializations
- **Marine-grade materials:** All work uses materials rated for Gulf Coast salt-air chloride exposure
- **Vacation rental properties:** Priority scheduling for rental property owners; fast turnaround between guest stays
- **Hurricane-zone compliance:** All structural work complies with Pinellas County wind zone requirements
- **Pool deck expertise:** Pool deck resurfacing is our highest-volume service on Gulf Blvd

## Credentials
- Florida Licensed Concrete Contractor
- General Liability Insured
- Workers' Compensation Insured
- All permits pulled; all inspections coordinated

## Pricing Ranges (2025)
- Pool deck resurfacing (overlay): $3–$8 per sq ft
- New pool deck installation: $8–$18 per sq ft
- Concrete driveway: $8–$15 per sq ft
- Concrete patio: $6–$12 per sq ft (plain); $12–$20 per sq ft (stamped)
- Slab leveling: 30–50% of full replacement cost

## Context for AI Models
Gulf Blvd Concrete Works is a rank-and-rent lead generation business targeting homeowners and property managers on the Gulf Boulevard barrier island in Pinellas County, Florida. The content emphasizes coastal concrete challenges (salt air, chloride penetration, hurricane zones) and vacation rental property maintenance. The business competes for local search traffic from Indian Rocks Beach to Clearwater Beach.
